reviews.text: Let me start off by saying Abbi was the BEST. I was so worried about choosing a photographer in Colorado, with us being from Texas and not getting to meet before hand I was nervous but Abbi was so sweet, easy to get along with and we just had the best time. I got our pictures back so quickly and it was just an amazing experience all around. She has a true eye for this, she saw things threw the camera that looked good to her so we went along with everything she said and it made for some amazing pictures that I get to cherish forever! We loved our Elopement with Abbi and couldn’t thank her enough for everything she did. 🤍

We cannot rave about Abbi enough! She is the sweetest, most talented, and easiest photographer to work with. We hired her for both our engagement and wedding photos. We absolutely loved how our engagement photos turned out and can’t wait to see our wedding pictures — we’re sure they’ll be just as beautiful. Abbi is amazing at making people feel comfortable in front of the camera. She gave us just the right amount of direction while keeping everything natural and candid (which was especially helpful for me since I don’t like getting my photo taken). Throughout our wedding day, she made us feel completely at ease and made the whole experience fun. Working with Abbi was easy, relaxed, and such a pleasure. We truly loved our time with her and her work, and we can’t recommend her enough!

I recently had the pleasure of having Abbi as my wedding photographer and words cannot express how grateful I am to have had her. From the consultation,  to the delivery of the stunning photos, Abbi continuously impressed me. She was an absolute joy to be around, helped me be at ease around the camera, and provided breathtaking photos that were beautifully retouched. If you are having any hesitation in who to hire for your wedding photography, Abbi Pittman is your girl. I continue to hire Abbi for any photography needs I have, and am always throughly in awe of her organizational skills, valuable guidance and direction, artistic vision, and final product. She knows how to create photos that you will truly cherish forever, but also create an unforgettable experience along the way. Thank you Abbi for providing these lasting memories for me, and for being a truly special touch to my special day.

Stop looking. This is the photographer you need to hire! Abbi Pittman is an excellent photographer with an incredible eye for detail but also someone you need to have on your team. Abbi was more than just our photographer, she helped pump me up, calm me down, even helped me carry my dress when no one else was around and above all capture me in the way I really wanted to be captured! Not to mention she is down for anything! When we asked to do a snowmobile shoot in the middle of nowhere , she was in! She has an incredible eye and frames the photos in a way that always seems bring out the best in anyone. I mean check out these photos!

When my partner and I decided to elope we spent so much time looking at different photographers and their content online. When we saw Abbi's work it felt like a great fit, and then after talking to her we knew we made the perfect choice. Abbi made us feel so comfortable and beautiful - she has such a good eye on top of being a really easy and fun person to work with. She's a mind reader - knew exactly how to interpret our wants and make everything work. The photos were exactly what we were hoping for. Thanks Abbi!
